# Zero Dawn Consulting

> Sydney-based studio designing websites and building AI workflow automation for Australian small and medium businesses. Also known as Zero Dawn Design Studio.

## What we do

- Web design and development: fast, modern, custom-designed websites for small and medium businesses
- UX/UI design: interfaces designed around how customers actually behave
- AI workflow automation: automating repetitive admin such as enquiry responses, quotes, follow-ups and data entry between existing business systems

## Who we work with

Australian small and medium businesses — trades, allied health, real estate, professional services and growing brands. Based in Sydney, working with clients across Australia, mostly remotely.

## Key facts

- Business name: Zero Dawn Consulting (site brand: Zero Dawn Design Studio)
- Location: Suite 2, Level 3, 13-15 Wentworth Avenue, Sydney NSW 2000, Australia
- Email: daniel@zerodawnconsulting.com
- Phone: +61 422 196 311
- Website: https://zerodawnconsulting.com/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/zero_dawn_consulting/
- Typical website delivery: 2-4 weeks from kick-off
- Pricing: quoted individually per project after a discovery conversation

## Selected work

- Origins Coffee Roasters — artisan coffee brand site
- YMAX Skills — EdTech platform
- Ventara (ventara.au) — technology procurement
- Penrith Electrical Services — local trade business
- Zoe Isaackson Law Firm — legal services
- Tribe41 Gym (tribe41northmead.com) — fitness brand
- Isaiah Jude Accounting — financial services
